RHOAI Release Manager - Help Guide

📊 Track Current Release Cycles

Monitor progress on scheduled releases (3.4, 3.5, etc.)

  • Select a release cycle from the dropdown
  • View all 3 events: EA1, EA2, GA
  • See metrics: feature count, story points, capacity status
  • Review feature lists with status and priority

📝 Draft Release Plans

View AI-recommended 2-year release plan (3.5-3.12)

  • Plan Modes: Toggle between Baseline and Optimized (XL Split)
  • Capacity Slider: Adjust per-event limit from 30 to 140 pts
  • Sizing Badges: See how each feature was sized (JIRA / AI / Keyword)
  • Split Indicators: Optimized mode shows Part 1/2 for XL splits
  • Release Goals: Each release shows strategic objectives

🔬 Feature Analysis

Comprehensive backlog analysis and optimization

  • Sizing Distribution: Breakdown of feature sizes with recommendations
  • Recommendations: Specific suggestions for splitting oversized features
  • Efficiency Score: Measure of delivery efficiency (target: 80+)

🔄 Release Cycle Structure

Each RHOAI release has 3 events delivered quarterly:

  • EA1: Early Access 1 (DP/TP features only)
  • EA2: Early Access 2 (DP/TP features only)
  • GA: General Availability (DP/TP/GA features)

Maturity Levels: DP (Dev Preview) → TP (Tech Preview) → GA (General Availability)

📏 Capacity Guidelines

  • 🟢 Conservative: ≤30 pts
  • 🟡 Typical: 31-50 pts
  • 🟠 Aggressive: 51-80 pts
  • 🔴 Maximum: 81-140 pts (historical max within 90% CI)

Historical baseline: 27.5 pts/event median, 140 pts historical max release

🏷️ Feature Status

  • Fix Version: Committed and approved
  • Target Version: Intended but not committed
  • In Plan: Ranked in JIRA Advanced Roadmaps Plan
  • Not in Plan: In RHAISTRAT project but not in plan

💡 Tips

  • Click ℹ️ icons throughout the interface for contextual help
  • Features show story points - auto-sized if not set in JIRA
  • Drag features between events to rebalance capacity
  • Watch capacity meters - stay under 80 pts per event
